positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest at dawn. The scene features glowing, bioluminescent flora (large lily pads, delicate fern structures) intertwined with the silhouettes of stylized, graceful deer and gentle flying origami moths. The background is a gradient wash of deep indigo, ethereal violet, and soft gold, suggesting the transition between night and day. Use clean, crisp lines, heavy contrast, and a limited, harmonious color palette (deep blues, electric teal, soft blush pink, mustard yellow). Composition should be centered and symmetrical, perfect for repeating apparel prints. Style should be neo-folk art meets scientific illustration, resembling high-end Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, with smooth, matte finishes and clean edges.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, text, logo, watermark, noise, grainy, messy, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, cartoon, photorealistic, CGI, oil paint
